results.title: openclaw - npm
results.description: Multi-channel AI gateway with extensible messaging integrations. Latest version: 2026.5.7, last published: 5 days ago. Start using openclaw in your project by running `npm i openclaw`. There are 128 other projects in the npm registry using openclaw.

results.title: Releases · openclaw/openclaw
results.description: Dependencies: refresh workspace dependency pins and lockfile, including @openai/codex 0.130.0, acpx 0.7.0, AWS SDK 3.1044.0, OpenTelemetry 0.217.0, typebox 1.1.38, vite 8.0.11, oxfmt 0.48.0, and oxlint 1.63.0, and update the Codex harness model snapshot for the new bundled app-server catalog. Plugins/install: add guarded plugin install overrides so onboarding and repair tests can route specific plugins to registry specs or local npm pack artifacts via environment variables. Tests/Docker: add Codex on-demand install and live plugin-tool dependency E2E lanes for packaged onboarding and npm-pack plugin proof.

results.title: The Ultimate Guide to OpenClaw NPM Latest Version: Features, Setup, and Alternatives
results.description: Step 1: Installation Open your terminal and run the following command to fetch the latest package from the official npm registry: npm install -g openclaw@latest Step 2: The Onboarding Wizard Once installed, initialize the setup wizard.
